description: Beyond the Veil Patch 9 (30 May 2023) — Travel Mode Improvements, Roads of Avalon Mob Camps, Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Travel Mode Improvements

items.text: Now persists through region transitions
Players can select whether the map should be focused on the character or remain in the center of the screen
The transparency of the map and map markers can now be set separately
Minimum transparency is now 30%
Button added to open Region Map

sections.searchable_text: Travel Mode Improvements Now persists through region transitions Players can select whether the map should be focused on the character or remain in the center of the screen The transparency of the map and map markers can now be set separately Minimum transparency is now 30% Button added to open Region Map

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Custom Matches now send additional chat messages when

subitems.text: A player signs up for a match
All players are signed up for a match
All players are registered and the match begins

items.text: Crystal Arena Season UI now displays player percentages up to two decimal places
Added a confirmation UI when clicking to exit Knightfall Abbey
Mobs now reset and fully heal up when a single player mounts up during combat
[MOBILE] Added ‘Share in Mail’ option to Loadout UI

sections.searchable_text: Changes Custom Matches now send additional chat messages when A match is created A player signs up for a match All players are signed up for a match A player registers All players are registered and the match begins Crystal Arena Season UI now displays player percentages up to two decimal places Added a confirmation UI when clicking to exit Knightfall Abbey Mobs now reset and fully heal up when a single player mounts up during combat [MOBILE] Added ‘Share in Mail’ option to Loadout UI

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

items.text: Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staff)

subitems.text: Mob immunity to consecutive casts: 5s → 11s (player immunity remains unchanged)

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staff) Mob immunity to consecutive casts: 5s → 11s (player immunity remains unchanged)

subsections.heading: Axes

items.text: Rending Spin (all Axes)
Deadly Chop (all Axes)

subsections.searchable_text: Axes Rending Spin (all Axes) Damage against Enemies closer than 2.5m: 45 → 65 Damage against Enemies 2.5m+ away: 68 → 80 Deadly Chop (all Axes) Standtime: 0.7s → 0.35s Cast Time: 0.5s → 0.4s Energy: 10 → 8

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs

items.text: Flame Tornado (Blazing Staff)

subitems.text: DoT Ticks after leaving the area: 3 → 5

stats.name: DoT Ticks after leaving the area

subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Flame Tornado (Blazing Staff) DoT Ticks after leaving the area: 3 → 5 Cooldown: 45s → 40s

items.text: Well of Life (Wild Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Well of Life (Wild Staff) Healing Ticks: 6 → 5 Healing per Tick: 46 → 55.2

items.text: Concussive Combo (all Quarterstaffs)

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Concussive Combo (all Quarterstaffs) 1st and 2nd Hit Damage: 75 → 85 3rd Hit Damage: 120 → 130

items.text: Spear Throw (Heron Spear)

subsections.heading: War Gloves

items.text: Purifying Combination (Fists of Avalon)

subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Purifying Combination (Fists of Avalon) Dive Kick Jump Speed: 14m/s → 16m/s

subsections.heading: Helmets

items.text: Purifying Smoke (Helmet of Valor)
Firebreath (Mage Cowl)

subitems.text: Slightly increased hitbox size close to the caster, as well as the speed at which the hitbox expands

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Purifying Smoke (Helmet of Valor) Hit Delay: 0.5s → 0.4s Firebreath (Mage Cowl) Slightly increased hitbox size close to the caster, as well as the speed at which the hitbox expands

subsections.heading: Armors

items.text: Purging Shield (Mage Robe)
Speed Caster (Scholar Robe)
Fury (Soldier Armor)

subitems.text: CC Duration Increase per Stack: 4% → 5% (max stays unchanged)

items.text: Electric Field (Stalker Jacket)

subitems.text: Damage from overlapping Electric Fields no longer stacks

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Purging Shield (Mage Robe) Cooldown: 45s → 40s Speed Caster (Scholar Robe) Cooldown: 40s → 35s Fury (Soldier Armor) Max Stacks: 10 → 8 Damage Increase per Stack: 7% (max 70%) → 9% (max 72%) CC Duration Increase per Stack: 4% → 5% (max stays unchanged) Cooldown: 40s → 35s Electric Field (Stalker Jacket) Damage from overlapping Electric Fields no longer stacks

subsections.heading: Shoes

items.text: Swift Cut (Assassin Shoes)
Vengeful Sprint (Demon Boots)

subitems.text: Increase caster's Move Speed by 50% and Damage by 10%
For every 20% Health missing, gain additional 25% Movement Speed and 5% damage increase (Max Stacks: 3)

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Swift Cut (Assassin Shoes) Dash Speed: 28m/s → 34m/s Vengeful Sprint (Demon Boots) Reworked the scaling Increase caster's Move Speed by 50% and Damage by 10% For every 20% Health missing, gain additional 25% Movement Speed and 5% damage increase (Max Stacks: 3) Cooldown: 60s → 40s

subsections.heading: Disarray Changes

items.text: Disarray Level 1 Threshold: 26 players → 21 players
Sequential Disarray levels are adjusted to begin at 5 fewer players

subitems.text: E.g. Disarray Level 2 Threshold: 27 players → 22 players

subsections.searchable_text: Disarray Changes Disarray Level 1 Threshold: 26 players → 21 players Sequential Disarray levels are adjusted to begin at 5 fewer players E.g. Disarray Level 2 Threshold: 27 players → 22 players

subsections.heading: Crystal Arena / 5v5 Crystal League

items.text: At the start of a match all players receive a +80% movement speed buff which lasts 5s

subitems.text: No further movement speed buffs can be received while active
Applied once per match, when leaving the tent for the first time

subsections.searchable_text: Crystal Arena / 5v5 Crystal League At the start of a match all players receive a +80% movement speed buff which lasts 5s Cannot be purged No further movement speed buffs can be received while active Applied once per match, when leaving the tent for the first time

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: UI Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue with zoom not working correctly in Character Creation UI
Fixed issue where resetting Interface Settings would not reset Region Map default zoom
Fixed issue where region information would disappear when Region Map opened successively
Fixed issue where clicking out of a Region Map while the World Map is open would cause the World Map to shift
Fixed issue where World Map would not update correctly after respawning in a Hideout
Fixed issue where reward popups would not display

items.text: Spell fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issues where Time Freeze would negate the damage immunity provided by Ice Block (Cleric Cowl) and would ignore the crowd control immunity of Untouchable (Fort Sterling Cape)
Fixed issue where the Internal Bleeding (Axes) VFX was not visible with low frame rates

items.text: Fixed issue where changing items or abilities while mounted did not trigger the ten-second ability cooldown
Siphoning Mages can once again use Ice Block more than once per fight
Fixed issue where players with the Hostile Dismount debuff could still perform executions
Fixed issue where Avalonian Lancers could jump-attack without channeling
Fixed issue where Hideout Protection Bubble would not break on world interaction

subitems.text: Hideouts can be entered instantly while Hideout Protection Bubble is active

items.text: Fixed issue with walls not displaying correctly on Knightfall Abbey Zone Map
Albion East Beta Season winner poem can now be viewed by clicking the statue
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where self-cast via double tap was not possible with Spell Target Preview
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where ground spell casts would not be cast while performing another action
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where cycling through targets could double back to the same target
[CONTROLLER] Location can once again be pinged on minimap
Additional minor graphical, animation, terrain, and localization fixes
